title: mdtoc slugger tournament VERDICT: score candidates, promote winner
description: Owns projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py and projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py. Run vectors.run_against on slugger_a/b/c; record each pass rate; pick winner by pass rate then clarity; promote winner to mdtoc/slugger.py exposing slugify(text, seen); author test_slugger.py running vectors against the promoted slugger. Cite the winner in notes. A DIFFERENT agent must verdict this done (producer not approver).
acceptance_criteria: ROLE = verifier. Owns EXACTLY: projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py and projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py. Depends on T-023,T-024,T-025,T-026 (vectors + all three candidates) being done.
Run vectors.run_against against each of slugger_a, slugger_b, slugger_c; record each candidate's passed/total in the task notes as a comparison table.
Pick the winner by (1) highest pass rate, then (2) code clarity/maintainability as a documented tiebreaker; state the ranking and the reason in the notes.

PROMOTE the winner to projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py: copy the winning slugify implementation verbatim (functionally), exposing slugify(text: str, seen: dict) -> str; add a module docstring naming which candidate won and why.
Author projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py: it runs vectors.run_against against the PROMOTED mdtoc/slugger.py (import via the mdtoc package) and asserts the recorded pass rate; it must pass.

PRODUCER != APPROVER: this task PRODUCES slugger.py + test_slugger.py, so a DIFFERENT agent must issue its done-verdict (hand off to verifier role; the final join T-029 also re-runs test_slugger.py against the promoted file).
stdlib only; the promotion is a mechanical copy, not new authoring of slug logic.

SHARED CONVENTIONS (all mdtoc tasks): Python 3.9+ stdlib ONLY, no pip deps. Package dir projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/ (namespace package; __init__.py is created only by T-028, so test files must add projects/mdtoc/ to sys.path and import as `from mdtoc.parser import ...`). Tests use unittest and must pass via `python3 -m unittest discover -s projects/mdtoc/tests -t projects/mdtoc`. No file listed here may be created/edited by any other task (disjoint ownership).
